steps.name: Phase 3: Property Implementation

steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/properties-phase-3.md. Run exclusively the properties-phase-3 agent using the Task tool. This phase will implement the properties from magic/properties-second-pass.md as actual invariant tests.
